title: EndpointType Deserialize duplicates from_uri match
description: Why: The Deserialize impl (types.rs ~line 195) repeats the same match arms as from_uri line-for-line. This is a DRY violation and a maintenance hazard — one match gets updated and the other silently diverges. What: Deserialize impl should call Ok(Self::from_uri(&raw)) instead of repeating the match.
